case_title: HON LAU VS. CALIFORNIA FRANCHISE TAX BOARD (Provide Access)

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAU, HON JURY DEMANDED

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAR-24-2010 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PETITIONER HON LAU'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-17-2011 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Hon Lau, appearing on his own behalf via telephone conference. Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff's Counsel or Self-represented Plaintiff for failure to file Proof of Service, obtain answer or enter default is heard this day. Court ordered case dismissed at the request of Plaintiff. Proceedings not reported. (610)
